# dismissalrate.org

> National Chapter 13 dismissal rate statistics by federal judicial district.

dismissalrate.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://dismissalrate.org/ -- National Chapter 13 dismissal rate statistics
- https://dismissalrate.org/what-it-means.html -- What happens when a case is dismissed
- https://dismissalrate.org/how-to-check.html -- Check your district's Chapter 13 success rate

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
